response.justification: Bogdan Szabo's background is almost entirely in web and full-stack development using TypeScript, Node.js, and JavaScript. His C++ exposure is limited to a 6-month stint at National Instruments (2014–2015) and a bachelor thesis project, far short of the 5–10 years of hands-on Windows C++ required. He has no fixed income or capital markets systems experience, no SQL Server or Oracle depth (primary database is MongoDB), and no mention of Summit, STL, Kafka/MQ, or other desirable skills. The one financial-adjacent role (RIDE Capital) was a TypeScript/Node.js engagement with no capital markets systems work.
strengths: Consistent CI/CD and DevOps practices across multiple roles, including GitLab, Docker, and trunk-based development
Brief C++ exposure at National Instruments writing components for a production C IDE, showing at least foundational familiarity
Strong communication skills evidenced by public talks, workshops, and teaching engagements
concerns: Effectively zero relevant C++ experience — primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js for over a decade with C++ limited to one 6-month role and a thesis
No capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain knowledge; RIDE Capital role was a TypeScript/GraphQL product engagement
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background centers on MongoDB with only generic SQL listed as a skill
